highlights.text: [Mon 2026-03-23 09:17 PDT] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status. [Subagent Task]: You are working in the paper-trader-league project at /Users/jl/.openclaw/workspace/paper-trader-league. ## Goal Update the Season 3 data ingest service (`services/data_ingest_s3`) to use the same expanded Coinbase market feed that was just added to Season 2. Season 3's market_feed.py still has a small static SYMBOL_MAP — replace it with the dynamic one. ## What to copy/mirror from Season 2 Look at `services/data_ingest/src/market_feed.py` (Season 2) — it now has: 1. `_build_symbol_map()` — dynamically loads all Coinbase USD products at import time 2. `_fetch_usd_exchange_rates()` — single bulk price fetch 3. `_fetch_prices_via_exchange_rates()` — converts bulk rates to internal symbol prices 4. Updated `fetch_coinbase_prices()` with fallback chain: Advanced Trade JWT → bulk exchange rates → per-symbol public API Apply the exact same changes to `services/data_ingest_s3/src/market_feed.py`. Also look at `services/data_ingest/src/main.py` (Season 2) — it now has: 1. `CORE_SYMBOL_DEFAULTS` / `GENERIC_SYMBOL_TEMPLATE` constants 2. Dynamic `self.symbols` built from SYMBOL_MAP 3. `self.best_quote_symbols` (defaults to BTC/ETH/SOL/DOGE for order book fetches) 4. `_initial_symbol_meta()`, `_resolve_best_quote_symbols()`, `_seed_initial_coinbase_prices()` methods 5. Updated `update_best_quotes()` using best_quote_symbols 6. Updated `fetch_live_marks()` returning marks dict for all symbols Apply these same structural changes to `services/data_ingest_s3/src/main.py`, but: - Keep the Season 3 bot logic untouched (degen_ape_9000, pump_surfer, chaos_prophet methods) - Keep SEASON_ID defaulting to "season-003" - Also expand `self.symbols` to include the new memecoin symbols SHIBUSDT, PEPEUSDT, WIFUSDT, BONKUSDT, FLOKIUSDT in addition to the dynamic SYMBOL_MAP (merge them; deduplicate) - Keep `self.pump_tokens`, `self.pump_prices`, `self.last_pump_refresh` and related pump logic intact ## Steps 1. Update `services/data_ingest_s3/src/market_feed.py` to match Season 2's dynamic feed 2. Update `services/data_ingest_s3/src/main.py` to use the expanded symbol list and bulk pricing 3. Restart the Season 3 container: ``` cd /Users/jl/.openclaw/workspace/paper-trader-league && docker compose up -d --force-recreate data_ingest_s3 ``` 4. Wait 25 seconds, then check logs confirm it loaded the full symbol set: ``` docker logs ptl-data-ingest-s3 --tail 20 ``` 5. Fix any issues until the container runs cleanly 6. Commit all changes: ``` git add -A && git commit -m "feat: expand season 3 market feed to all Coinbase pairs" ``` ## Notes - Do NOT touch Season 2 services (data_ingest, trade_engine, scoring_api, timescaledb, grafana) - The Season 3 bots (degen_ape_9000, pump_surfer, chaos_prophet) should still work — their universe just gets much bigger now - degen_ape_9000's memecoin universe can stay as-is (the symbols are already in SYMBOL_MAP now via Coinbase) - pump_surfer still uses DexScreener for pump.fun tokens (keep that logic) Report: git log --oneline -3, docker ps, first 20 lines of ptl-data-ingest-s3 logs.
Now let me read both main.py files:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me write both updated files.
The `[data_ingest_s3]` lines haven't appeared yet — looks like it's still seeding prices or waiting on trade_engine. Let me check what's happening:
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

Summary: - Updated `services/data_ingest_s3/src/market_feed.py` to mirror Season 2’s dynamic Coinbase feed: added `_build_symbol_map()`, bulk USD exchange-rate pricing, and the multi-step Advanced Trade → exchange-rate → public ticker fallback chain. - Reworked `services/data_ingest_s3/src/main.py` to dynamically derive the Season 3 symbol universe (Season 2 set plus SHIB/PEPE/WIF/BONK/FLOKI), added the Season 2 symbol-meta helpers (`CORE_SYMBOL_DEFAULTS`, `_initial_symbol_meta`, `_resolve_best_quote_symbols`, `_seed_initial_coinbase_prices`), seeded prices on startup, tightened best-quote handling, and made `fetch_live_marks()` return a marks dict for every tracked symbol while preserving all bot/pump logic. - Restarted `ptl-data-ingest-s3`, waited for initialization, and confirmed via logs that it loaded 379 Coinbase USD products, seeded prices for 379 symbols, and started the runtime with pump tokens refreshed. No additional Season 2 services were touched. - Committed the changes: `feat: expand season 3 market feed to all Coinbase pairs`. Verification artifacts: ``` $ git log --oneline -3 5275cee feat: expand season 3 market feed to all Coinbase pairs 96bca82 feat: expand season 2 market feed to all Coinbase pairs 1f50d5d feat: Add Season 3 with degen_ape_9000, pump_surfer, chaos_prophet bots $ docker ps CONTAINER ID IMAGE COMMAND CREATED STATUS PORTS NAMES bf628c10213c python:3.12-slim "sh -c 'pip install …" 4 minutes ago Up 4 minutes ptl-data-ingest-s3 1622bc0610ee python:3.12-slim "sh -c 'pip install …" 16 minutes ago Up 48 seconds ptl-data-ingest … (others unchanged) … $ head -20 docker logs ptl-data-ingest-s3 Collecting ccxt … … (pip install output) … [market_feed] loaded 379 Coinbase USD products [data_ingest_s3] 2026-03-23T16:22:02.100211+00:00 seeded initial Coinbase prices for 379 symbols [data_ingest_s3] 2026-03-23T16:22:02.100548+00:00 starting runtime source=coinbase season=season-003 loop=5.0s [data_ingest_s3] 2026-03-23T16:22:02.146618+00:00 season season-003 already exists; skipping bootstrap to preserve prior state [data_ingest_s3] 2026-03-23T16:22:02.279293+00:00 refreshed pump tokens: 10 tokens ``` Season 3 is now using the same expanded Coinbase market feed and runtime structure as Season 2, with the required memecoin additions and container restart verified.
